title: Schoolgirl Diary
writer: Aldo De Benedetti, Marcello Marchesi, Mario Mattoli
actors: Alida Valli, Irasema Dilián, Andrea Checchi
plot: The girls of a college suspect one of them, Maria, of having an affair with Marini, a handsome chemistry teacher. Anna, another student and a snobbish socialite, is under Marini's spell and finds a rival in Maria. Things are tense...
